powershell -NoProfile -Command "@'

    py_compile.compile(str(path), doraise=True)
print('py_compile ok')
'@ | & 'C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Windows-specific startup and validation guidance telling workers to prefer the existing `*_windows` commands in `.factory/services.yaml` when operating on Windows, instead of defaulting to POSIX-oriented setup or generic commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-t25-roster-turnover-gate` found `.factory/skills/feature-worker/SKILL.md:40-50` still lists generic commands while `.factory/services.yaml:6-7,12` already provides `install_windows`, `init_windows`, and `test_windows`; the feature handoff records a justified deviation after `.factory/init.sh` failed on Windows.
